summary: The inspection identified one architecture improvement and verified that the finding includes traceable evidence.

findings.claim: The CLI entrypoint should delegate orchestration to an application service instead of owning workflow logic directly.

evidence.excerpt: The entrypoint parses input and starts inspection orchestration.

findings.recommendation: Keep CLI parsing in the adapter layer and move orchestration decisions behind an application port.

qaResults.rationale: The finding includes a clear architecture claim, traceable evidence, and an actionable recommendation.

checks.name: evidence-present
checks.notes: File path and line range are present.

knowledgeCards.summary: CLI entrypoints should translate user input and delegate workflow decisions to application services.
knowledgeCards.whenToUse: When adding CLI behavior that should delegate workflow decisions.
knowledgeCards.whenNotToUse: When implementing pure domain model behavior.
knowledgeCards.adaptationNotes: Keep user input translation near the adapter boundary.
